market_overview.headline: Market showing mixed signals with SPY in bull pullback while tech (QQQ) loses momentum and crypto (BTC) in full bear mode.
market_overview.detail: 46% of stocks in Full Bull but significant 19% in Full Bear, with major indices showing divergent EMA structures and crossover risks.

momentum_themes.headline: Memory/Storage Semiconductor Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology leading with memory and storage names showing explosive momentum - SNDK up 49% vs 21W, WDC and MU both +24%.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation Snapshot

strongest.note: Perfect bullish alignment with 12.5% average gains vs 21W EMA
Commodities complex showing unanimous strength at +18% vs 21W
Trade/logistics benefiting from economic expansion narrative

weakest.note: Software/services getting crushed with 91% bearish and -9% avg performance
Discretionary spending under pressure with 80% in bear structures
Business services sector completely broken down

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into cyclicals and commodities, with finance sector (46% bull) caught in the middle showing mixed signals.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ showing bearish crossover risks with compressed EMA spreads
BTC full bear structure (-15% vs 21W) signals crypto correlation risk
Technology services sector 91% bearish - avoid software/SaaS names
25 Bull Breakdown signals suggest uptrend deterioration accelerating
